writing_guidelines.tone: Professional yet conversational. Educational without being condescending. Practical and direct — gives the reader real answers, not vague guidance. Avoids fluff and filler sentences.
writing_guidelines.voice: Second-person throughout ('you', 'your'). Authoritative but not corporate. Reads like a knowledgeable friend who owns a storage facility, not a salesperson.
style_notes: Open with the core problem or question the reader is trying to solve — no generic landscape-setting intros.
Use H2/H3 hierarchy consistently. H2s are major topic shifts, H3s are sub-points within a section.
Use tables for comparisons (costs, regulations, options side-by-side). Use bullet points for lists of 3+ items.
Include a FAQ section at the end with 4–6 practical questions the reader would actually type into Google.
Cite external sources inline with links: municipal codes, state vehicle agencies, federal regulations (FMCSA, NHTSA), and industry data (J.D. Power, NMMA, ATVA). Link to the source directly.

Mention RecNation naturally within the body where storage is relevant — never as a hard sales push. Example: 'Facilities like RecNation offer covered and enclosed options for long-term storage.' Link to a relevant storage page.
Word count: 2,000–3,500 words depending on topic breadth. Comprehensive coverage is expected.
No invented statistics. Use ranges or directional language if a precise figure is unavailable.
Articles must include a meta title, meta description (155 chars max), and excerpt at the top of the document — matching the format in the example articles.
banned_phrases: At the end of the day
writing_guidelines.cta_pattern: Within the body, link to the relevant RecNation storage page once or twice where storage is a natural next step. Do not close the article with a hard CTA paragraph — let the content lead naturally to storage as a solution.
writing_guidelines.article_top_matter: Every article must start with: Meta Title, Meta Description, Excerpt, Slug (if known), then the H1 and article body. Match the format of the example articles exactly.
